title: Epicfight:Farmer's Delight Compat
description:
Add compatibility between Epic Fight and Farmer's Delight.
Who wants to get hit by a frying pan?
body:
## What is this?
Epic Fight is a great mod, but it's a shame that it rarely supports items from other mods.
This data pack/mod adds Epic Fight data to Farmer's Delight knives (and extra).
Farmer's Delight and Epic Fight are required.

## Features of each item
- Knife

Weapons similar to Dagger.
It is relatively light and can knock down enemies.
Compared to the Dagger, it has a lower attack speed, attack power, and armor piercing ability, but in exchange it can attack two enemies at once and has a longer stun duration.
In general, it is a strong force in many-to-one situations.
- Skilet

A heavy weapon that provides a very large gap. It can also be guarded, but the variety of attacks it can produce is small.
- Uchigatana...?(Don't play with food!)

What did they misunderstand?
That food seems to think it's a sword.
But if you pull it off the stick... There will only be disastrous consequences.
... However, all nearby enemies will not like this attack!
